title: The Lab Opens!
summary: Demitre Serletis moved to the Cleveland Clinic to set up his lab

title: A New Arrival!
summary: Alejandro Nieto Ramos joins the lab as a post-doctoral research fellow.

title: A New Arrival!
summary: Neha Sara John joins the lab as a senior research engineer.

title: Poster Presentation
summary: Alejandro and Neha will present their posters at the Cleveland Clinic Neurological Institute Research Day 2023

title: A New Arrival!
summary: M. Rabiul Islam joins the lab as a post-doctoral research fellow.

title: Congratulations Alejandro!
summary: Alejandro Nieto Ramos was awarded the American Epilepsy Society Fellowship 2023

title: AES Poster Presentation
summary: Alejandro will present his poster at the American Epilepsy Society's Annual Meeting in Orlando, FL (1 - 5 December 2023)

title: UPSTAT Poster Presentation
summary: Alejandro will present his poster at the American Epilepsy Society's Annual Meeting in Rochester, NY

title: CNS Poster Presentation
summary: Demitre will present a poster at the Congress of Neurological Surgeons' Annual Meeting in Houston, TX (September 28 - October 2nd, 2024)

title: CC Research Day Poster Presentation
summary: Alejandro, Neha and Rabi will present their posters at the Cleveland Clinic Research Day 2024.

title: AES Poster Presentation
summary: Alejandro, Neha and Rabi will present their posters at the American Epilepsy Society's Annual Meeting in Los Angeles, CA (6 - 10 December 2024).

title: Congratulations Alejandro!
summary: Alejandro's paper 'Epileptic network identification...' was accepted in Journal of Neural Engineering.

title: Congratulations Rabi!
summary: M. Rabiul Islam was awarded the American Epilepsy Society Fellowship 2024

title: Congratulations Alejandro!
summary: Alejandro Nieto Ramos was awarded the Best Poster Award for his poster at the Cleveland Clinic Research Day 2025.

title: NERD Poster Presentation
summary: Alejandro, Neha and Neha will present their posters at the Annual Cleveland Clinic Neurologic Education & Research Day (NERD) held on May 13, 2025.

title: Congratulations Neha!
summary: Neha Sara John was awarded the Thomas Epilepsy Award for her poster at NERD 2025.

title: SFN Poster Presentation
summary: Neha will present her poster at the Society for Neuroscience's Annual Meeting in San Diego, CA (November 15-19, 2025).

title: Congratulations Neha!
summary: Neha's paper 'Multifractal spatiotemporal dynamics...' was accepted in Journal of Neural Engineering.

title: AES Poster Presentation
summary: Rabi will present his poster at the American Epilepsy Society's Annual Meeting in Atlanta, GA (December 5-9, 2025).

title: Congratulations Rabi!
summary: Rabi's paper 'Dynamic Stereoelectroencephalography-based...' was accepted in International Journal of Neural Systems.

title: ASSFN Poster
summary: Neha John will present her poster at the American Society for Stereotactic and Functional Neurosurgery Biennial Meeting in Cleveland, OH (May 30 - June 2, 2026)

title: Congratulations Rabi!
summary: M. Rabiul Islam will give an oral presentation at the American Society for Stereotactic and Functional Neurosurgery Biennial Meeting in Cleveland, OH (May 30 - June 2, 2026)
